# UC-12.2.32 · Argo CD Prune Disabled with Auto-Sync Enabled (Policy Drift)

## Description

Auto-sync without prune accumulates orphaned resources and hides drift.

## Value

Flags risky GitOps posture where deleted manifests never remove cluster objects.

## Implementation

Ingest full application spec nightly; alert in staging clusters too. Pair with OPA policy audits if available.

## SPL

```spl
index=devops sourcetype="argocd:application"
| search automated="true" OR sync_policy_automated="true"
| search prune="false" OR sync_policy_prune="false" OR "prune\":false"
| table _time, name, namespace, project, revision, sync_policy_automated
| sort -_time
```

## Visualization

Table (non-pruning automated apps), Pie chart (prune on vs off).

## References

- [Argo CD Splunk integration notes](https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/wiki/Splunk)
